name: Tenant-isolated operational memory foundation
requiresDatabases: pgvector when semantic retrieval is enabled
project-local Notion projection databases when Notion projection is enabled

dataIsolation.guard: Every operational-memory row carries tenant_id; database Row Level Security and the AMCore AccessContext must agree before reads, writes, retrieval, projections, or answer citations are allowed.

definitionOfDone: Package files and machine-readable contracts pass the package verifier
The target AM has a unique tenant id and project-local connector configuration
Raw LINE ingestion is idempotent and acknowledges before AI processing
Confirmed events, tasks, task changes, decisions, and answers cannot exist without project-local source evidence
Formal tasks link to a confirmed project goal; useful goal-unknown work remains a candidate with clarification needed
Task reconciliation updates one canonical task and appends history instead of creating message-per-task duplicates
Structured project, task, and decision queries run before raw-message retrieval
Cross-tenant reads and writes fail at both application and PostgreSQL RLS layers
Notion is treated as a projection and can be rebuilt without losing PostgreSQL state
Project manifest and project-local upgrade record are updated after local verification
